clips.title: The Apartment
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible chase. The camera races after a person running through an apartment, and instead of stopping at walls it passes impossibly straight through them, phasing through plaster and furniture from room to room in a single unbroken take. A person in casual clothes running. Seamless through-wall camera, impossible continuous tracking, energetic, 24fps.
